phoneticUs: 藢忙ntik蓹m藞pet瑟t瑟v; 藢忙nta瑟m藞pet瑟t瑟v
examples: It has since countersued, accusing Oracle of anticompetitive behaviour.
Google, which lost out in the bidding, criticized the deal as an anticompetitive strategy.
Yet the Jobsian vision was anticompetitive, argued policy experts, and a business error, thought Google.
Section 1 largely addresses situations involving anticompetitive behavior of two or more entities working in concert.
